name: Plasmapheresis aging-biomarker registry
summary: Unknown-status randomized registry comparing plasmapheresis with albumin compensation versus plasmapheresis without albumin compensation for aging-biomarker correction.
population: Men and women aged 40 to 55 years

trial_details.expected_results_window: Estimated primary completion was October 30, 2022 and study completion was December 30, 2022; no posted results were present in the June 9, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is aging-biomarker trial-status context, not efficacy evidence.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results could help separate albumin-compensated plasma exchange from plasmapheresis without replacement in middle-aged adults.
